item.title: Why Trump’s ‘Cash for Healthcare’ Idea Likely Wouldn’t Work in Practice
item.description: Last week, Trump proposed cutting out insurers and giving Americans cash to buy their own healthcare, claiming it would lower costs.

item.title: Theravance Drug Fails Another Pivotal Test, Sparking Restructuring, Possible Sale
item.description: Ampreloxetine’s Phase 3 failure in multiple system atrophy is the third disappointing clinical trial outcome for the Theravance Biopharma drug.

item.title: Trump Says U.S. Navy Vessels Could Accompany Tankers in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Navy vessels have previously been employed as part of Operation Prosperity Guardian to help protect civilian ships in the Red Sea.

item.title: Trump Admin Calls ‘Backsies’ On Law Firm Executive Order Appeals
item.description: Less than 24 hours later, the DOJ is attempting to reverse its surrender.

item.title: Opening Bell: 3.4.26
item.description: Blue Owl’s got’em worried; banking with MrBeast; Elon Musk on the stand is always good value; Howard Lutnick heads to the Hill; and more!
